experience.explanation: Saturday evening medal session draws broader Games-wide crowds shifting between venues; penultimate night energy and extended format create intense atmosphere.

starPower.explanation: Men's 74kg finals could feature world-level wrestlers from half-dozen countries; 125kg heavyweights deliver explosive matches on wrestling's biggest stage.

uniqueness.explanation: Penultimate medal night follows established evening format; dramatic weight-class histories matter more than session structure itself.

demand.explanation: Medal pricing and Saturday evening timing drive strong demand; tournament's visible final day approaching boosts appeal versus mid-week sessions.

scorecard.overall: Penultimate medal night anchored by freestyle's deepest 74kg class; Saturday evening and Games-final energy sustain strongest appeal.

significance.explanation: Wrestling's final nine medals awarded across men's freestyle 65kg, 97kg and women's 76kg; last competition of tournament determines final champions and national team standings.

experience.explanation: Sunday closing session with mat-side medal ceremonies and tournament conclusion; athletes from all weight classes return to floor for closing celebration despite midday timing.

starPower.explanation: Final weight classes feature competitive international fields; while not marquee names, medalists will be world-ranked specialists who've survived full tournaments.

uniqueness.explanation: Wrestling's definitive closing moment: final medals, final ceremonies, 16-day tournament bookended; Sunday conclusion to a Games sport is singularly unrepeatable.

demand.explanation: Medal pricing and tournament-closing status drive strong demand; final-session scarcity and championship implications elevate appeal despite Sunday midday timing.

scorecard.overall: Wrestling's championship-closing finale crowns last three weight classes; historical bookend and medal ceremony atmosphere outweigh midday timing.
